description: This file contains unit tests for the Button component in a JavaScript project, including tests for instantiation, toggle behavior, disposal, and jQuery compatibility.

classes.name: Button
classes.description: The Button class, representing button UI component with methods for toggling, disposing, and instance retrieval.

methods.name: Button
methods.description: Constructor for Button class, initializes with a DOM element or CSS selector.

methods.name: Button.getInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing Button instance associated with a DOM element, or null if none exists.

methods.name: Button.getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Returns an existing Button instance or creates a new one if none exists.

methods.name: Button.prototype.toggle
methods.description: Toggles the active state of the button, updating aria-pressed attribute and class.

methods.name: Button.prototype.dispose
methods.description: Disposes of the Button instance, cleaning up references.
